titleStmt.title: SII 37.20: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 20. (A.R. No. 345 of 1938-39.) Chintalapaṭṭūru, (hamlet of Koṭlūru) Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: The basement of the Indranāthēśvara temple.
The is dated Śaka 1222, Śārvari, Jyēshtha śu. 5, Monday, corresponding to 1300 A.D. July 23.

It refers to the division of the vṛitti lands of the temples of Indrēśvaradēva, Sōmanāthadēva and Mallināthadēva among Dēvajiyya, son of Mallijiyya. Bāḷadēvajiyya, his younger brother Gaṁgajiyya and the elder brother Mallidēvajiyya, the sthānapatis of the former temple, as agreed upon by them in the presence of the Mahājanas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1222 Agunēṁṭi sārvvari saṁvatsara jēṣṭa sudda 5 sō . puṣpagiri paṁcamaṭa stānamuvāru kēśavapedi bollamarājunumukhyamaina samasta prajannu Iṁtavaṭṭuvāri muṁdarannu Iṁdrēśvara dēvarastānapatulu mallijeyyala dēvajeyyalu bālajeyyalu Itanitammuḍu gaṁggajeyyalu Annamalladēvajeyyalu tamalōni vrittivyavasta nirnnayamaina kramameṭlannanu Iṁdrēśvara dēvara vrittini sōmanātadēvara vritti mallināta dēvara vritti pūrvvānanunaḍacina kramālana
mallajiyyala dēvayānu bāladēvayānu gaṁggenu sagamūnu Annamallidēvaya sagamūnu Anubhaviṁppaṁgalavāru . I reṁḍu sagamula pottunanu Iṁdrēśvaradēvara sōmanātadēvara vrittulayaṁdu revvajiyyalaku Ammikonna vapālu revvajiyyala Anubhaviṁppaṁgalavāṁḍu ĀcaṁdrārkkastāIgānu sukhamanubhaviṁppaṁgalavāru . vīriyubhayānmatamuna pōtāṇāyani koḍku karaṇaṁ bayyana vrālu . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
